sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import './Page.css'; import './AboutUs.css'; const PILLARS = [ { title: 'strength', body: 'We believe physical and inner strength are inseparable. Every practice we offer is designed to build both.' }, { title: 'grace', body: 'Movement rooted in intention. We honour the elegance within every body, every lineage, every story.' }, { title: 'community', body: 'Ru Shakti is a space held by its people. We grow through shared ritual, honest conversation, and collective care.' }, ]; export default function AboutUs() { return (

who we are

about us

Ru Shakti is a movement studio and community rooted in the belief that strength and grace are not opposites — they are the same force, expressed differently.

{PILLARS.map(({ title, body }) => (

{title}

{body}

))}

our story

born from practice,
built for community

Founded in 2019, Ru Shakti began as a small weekly gathering of dancers, yogis, and martial artists who wanted something deeper than a studio class. What started in a borrowed basement is now a thriving collective offering movement workshops, retreats, and mentorship programs.

The name draws from Sanskrit — ru, to move, and shakti, the primordial feminine energy that drives all creation. Together they speak to a practice that is always in motion, always alive.

); }
